title: Iran doesn't have 'kamikaze dolphins,' Hegseth says. But marine mammals have a long history of military use
summary_full: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.
summary_public: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.

IR.label: neutral
